data.content: Approved in implementation_review. Verified committed implementation matches beat-id search by full ID and suffix-only ID, and search bypasses state filtering so knots remain discoverable in any state. Reviewed HEAD search paths and focused coverage in knots/beads backends plus beats page behavior. Sanity checks: targeted tests passed (99/99), bunx tsc --noEmit passed, bun run build passed, lint completed with warnings only and no errors.
